content_blocks.text: I'll delegate the fetch to a sub-agent with only the web_fetch tool.

input.prompt: Fetch the page at https://facts.test/reactor using your web_fetch tool. On that page, find the "Zorblax reactor" operating temperature. Report back exactly what the page states about the Zorblax reactor's operating temperature, including the numeric value and any units given. Quote the relevant text verbatim. If the page cannot be fetched or the value is not present, say so explicitly.
input.title: Fetch Zorblax reactor temperature
